title: Sidekick
description: Your creative companion — extended inventory, noclip, teleport, and other superpowers for Creative mode.
body:
**Sidekick is a complete overhaul of the Creative inventory, and a large collection of useful
superpowers to make creative building a breeze.**

Starting as Not Enough Creativity, my first major 1.16+ mod inspired by Not Enough Items' Creative+
mode, Sidekick has been entirely rewritten for better mod compatibility, a smoother experience, and
a well-designed protocol intended to be implementable by other mods and even plugins.

The Creative+ inventory uses Survival inventory code rather than Creative, meaning it is mostly
server-side and isn't prone to the jank and desync that the vanilla Creative inventory has.
Additionally, you get access to the 2x2 crafting grid — useful for dyeing items and the like.

**All of the vanilla creative tabs are still available within the Creative+ inventory**, but they
are tucked away to a background tab panel for an inventory-focused workflow, and have a fairly
different UX to the vanilla system — intended for quicker access and being *slightly* better about
large amounts of Creative tabs.

Above the inventory, a collection of toggleable *Powers* can be found, which are:
- **No Item Pickup** - Disable pickup of stray items on the ground, to keep your inventory clear.
- **Instant Kill** - Greatly increase your punch damage to get rid of pesky mobs without carrying a sword around.
- **Enable Health** - Enable damage and show your health bar. You still can't die, except by the usual things that kill Creative players.
- **No Break Delay** - Disable the Creative break delay, to break blocks like a gold pick through netherrack.
- **Full Bright** - Ignore lighting, making everything appear fully lit. Does not change the fog.
- **Phase** - Freely pass through blocks like a Spectator.
- **Long Reach** - Increase your reach from 4-ish blocks to 12 blocks.
- **Free Flight** - Fly like old Classic mods, rather than the momentum-based vanilla system. Select full-3D or plane-lock in Options.
- **Super Speed** - Quadruples your flight speed.

Additionally, Sidekick offers a few configurable options that apply globally rather than per-world:
- **Plane Lock** - Ignore your vertical facing when moving in Free Flight mode, similar to vanilla flight.
- **Pick Swap** - Items that are displaced by pickblock are put into the extended inventory for later use, rather than deleted.
- **Disable Animations** - Disable the transitions and animations, for maximum no-nonsense efficiency.
- **UI Sounds** - Play audible feedback where vanilla doesn't.
- **Creative Tabs** - Show the vanilla creative tabs. May be undesirable for an item sidebar workflow.
- **Delete Mode** - Shift-clicking the Destroy Item button enters Destroy Mode instead of deleting everything. Disable for vanilla behavior.
- **Night Owl** - Make the Sidekick GUI darker, instead of pure vanilla style.
